name: vscode-extension-tester
description: Copilot CLI-powered agent for testing VS Code extensions like a real user

scripts.build:native: dotnet publish dotnet/FlaUIBridge.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:PublishTrimmed=false -p:DebugType=None -p:DebugSymbols=false -o packages/cli/assets/native/win-x64
